data.title: Scalable Cloud Architecture
data.description: The site architecture relies on cloud-based infrastructure for scalability and efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Hosted on AWS cloud services with auto-scaling capabilities.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Uses microservices to enhance modular development and deployment.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed into several dockerized microservices communicating via REST APIs.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Global content delivery network to ensure fast load times regardless of user location.

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: Ensures accessibility and usability across a range of devices and screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes responsive design frameworks such as Bootstrap.

data.title: HTTP/2 Protocol
data.description: The site adopts HTTP/2 protocol for improved performance and speed.
